title: AFFORDABLE HOUSING - 211info
text: NORTHWEST REAL ESTATE CAPITAL CORPORATION AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing for families, older adults, and adults with disabilities. Specializes in the property management and rehabilitation of HUD/Section 8, Rural Development, and Tax Credit Housing. 210 W Mallard Drive Suite A Boise, ID 83706 Eligibility: Varies by property Hours: No standard hours (208) 375-9407 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (208) 375-9407 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Varies by property DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: States of Alaska, Arizona, Idaho, Montana, Nevada, and Wyoming and Cities of Bandon, Beaverton, Canby, Coos Bay, Cornelius, Florence, Forest Grove, Hermiston, Hillsboro, John Day, Klamath Falls, La Grande, Lincoln City, Medford, Oakridge, Ontario, Oregon City, Pendleton, Portland, Prineville, Reedsport, Scappoose, Stayton, Tigard, and Woodburn. Services: Elderly/Disabled Home Rental Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST REAL ESTATE CAPITAL CORPORATION
